name: ClawEye
description: A comprehensive catalog system for the OpenClaw agentic skills registry with built-in static security scanning and visualization dashboard.
review: ClawEye is a highly unique and essential contribution to the OpenClaw ecosystem. It provides a comprehensive Python CLI for catalog building and a user-friendly React dashboard for visualization, with integrated static security scanning. The documentation is exceptionally detailed with architecture diagrams and complete usage guides. The skill uses modern development practices (Python 3.12+, uv, React 19, DuckDB WASM) and offers significant community value through centralized, searchable, security-audited skill discovery.
